name: Set Several Categories Per Product
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "There are 2 ways you can create several categories per one product:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Using the Product Type field in Shopify."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Using the Product Tags field in Shopify."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "1. Product Type field in Shopify"}]}, {"type": "blockquote", "children": [{"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "❗️ IMPORTANT!"}]}, {"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "Please Note:", "bold": true}, {"text": " This change will only be reflected within Merchandising where it can be applied as a facet or filter products in configurations/merchandising. In Shopify, the full query will be read as ONE category value. If applied, ensure your Shopify configurations for e.g. Automated Collections are aligned accordingly."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Steps to set several categories per product:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create several categories per product on Shopify using the Product Type field."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Product Sync on Merchandising Merchant Dashboard"}]}]}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 1: Create several categories per product"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you want to specify several categories per product, you would need to:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Go to the product page in Shopify"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the \"product_type\" field, insert the symbol \"##\" between the different categories. For instance \"Category 1 ## Category 2\". This feature also works for the hierarchy of categories, for instance: \"Cat 1 > Subcat 1 > Subsubcat1 ## Cat 2 > Subcat2\"."}]}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/QL79QB41CB2D/13d4c8ad-248c-4a83-b291-27590fe695d0.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/QL79QB41CB2D/13d4c8ad-248c-4a83-b291-27590fe695d0.png", "name": "13d4c8ad-248c-4a83-b291-27590fe695d0.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 271121, "width": 1919, "height": 895, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "mediaID": 543, "dateInserted": "2025-09-18T19:50:21+00:00", "insertUserID": 1178, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "1178", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "\nStep 2: Product Sync"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Go to our "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://dashboard.findify.io/settings/product-sync", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Merchant Dashboard"}]}, {"text": " and perform product sync."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": "", "code": true}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/804e3ea-Product_sync.gif", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/804e3ea-Product_sync.gif", "name": "", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "resizemode": "stretchy-fit", "source": "external"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "2. Product Tags field in Shopify."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Steps to set several categories per product:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create several categories per product in Shopify using the Product Tags."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Contact Merchandising to setup the Tags-based settings."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Product Sync on Merchandising Merchant Dashboard"}]}]}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 1: Create several categories per product using the Product Tags."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you want to specify several categories per product with Product Tags, you would need to:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Go to the Product Page in Shopify."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the tags section, you would need to create multiple tags in this format - \"Category:some_category\". This feature also works with nested categories: \"Category:Cat1>Cat2\"."}]}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": "", "code": true}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/38c1179-Product_Categories_based_on_Product_Tags_Shopify.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/38c1179-Product_Categories_based_on_Product_Tags_Shopify.png", "name": "", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "resizemode": "stretchy-fit", "source": "external"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 2. Contact Merchandising Support Team."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You need to contact Merchandising Support: "}, {"type": "a", "url": "mailto:support@maropost.com", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "support@maropost .com"}]}, {"text": " to update the settings to use the Product Tags for Category filters intead of Product Type field."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 3: Product Sync"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Go to our "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://dashboard.findify.io/settings/product-sync", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Merchant Dashboard"}]}, {"text": " and perform product sync."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": "", "code": true}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/9dd2c33-Product_sync.gif", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/9dd2c33-Product_sync.gif", "name": "", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "resizemode": "stretchy-fit", "source": "external"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "\n"}]}]
